title: Antilles (disambiguation)
content:
'''Antilles''' might refer to:

==Canon==
*'''[[Bail Antilles]]''', a [[Galactic Republic|Republic]] [[Senator]] from [[Alderaan]]
*'''[[Raymus Antilles]]''', the [[captain]] of the ''[[Tantive III]]'' and the ''[[Tantive IV]]''
*'''[[Wedge Antilles]]''', a famous [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebel]] and [[New Republic]] starfighter pilot
*'''The [[Antilles Intercept]]''', a flight maneuver, named after Wedge Antilles, that was used by the [[Resistance]] for training their [[Resistance pilot|pilots]].

==Legends==
The were multiple Antilles in [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]]:
*The '''[[House of Antilles]]''' of [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]]
**'''[[Bail Antilles/Legends|Bail Antilles]]''', an [[Alderaanian/Legends|Alderaanian]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]]
**'''[[Raymus Antilles/Legends|Raymus Antilles]]''', pilot of the [[Tantive IV/Legends|''Tantive IV'']]
**'''[[Deara Antilles]]''', Breha's sister and an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] spy
**'''[[Breha Organa/Legends|Breha Antilles Organa]]''', wife of [[Bail Prestor Organa/Legends|Bail Organa]]
*The '''[[Antilles family/Legends|Antilles family]]''' of [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]
**'''[[Jagged Antilles]]''', Wedge's father
**'''[[Zena Antilles]]''', Wedge's mother
**'''[[Syal Antilles Fel]]''', Wedge's sister, [[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel's]] wife, and a [[Holodrama/Legends|holodrama]] actress
**'''[[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]''', a famous [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] and [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] starfighter pilot
**'''[[Iella Wessiri Antilles]]''', a Rebel spy and Wedge's wife
**'''[[Syal Antilles]]''', Wedge's older daughter
**'''[[Myri Antilles]]''', Wedge's younger daughter
*'''[[Jon Antilles|"Jon Antilles"]]''', a pseudonym used by a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]]
*'''[[Bail Antilles (Galactic Alliance)|Bail Antilles]]''', a member of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] [[Triumvirate (Galactic Alliance)|Triumvirate]]
*'''[[Ona Antilles]]''', the daughter of Bail Antilles and a [[Galactic Alliance Defense Force]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]]
*'''[[Henrietya Antilles|Henrietya "Corellia" Antilles]]''', a [[Archaeology/Legends|xenoarchaeologist]] for the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]
*'''[[Barzur Antilles]]''', a criminal
*'''[[Antilles (Mere)|Antilles]]''', a member of the [[Mere Resistance]]
*'''[[Antilles (Agarees Shipyard Township)|Antilles]]''', an individual at the [[Agarees Shipyard Township]]
*'''[[K. Antilles]]''', a member of the [[Liana Liberators]]
*'''[[Antilles (sniper)|"Sureshot" Antilles]]''', a [[Sniper/Legends|sniper]] serving in [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Alliance Special Forces]]
*[[Antilles (Blue Harvest)|'''Antilles''']], a protagonist of the novel [[Blue Harvest (novel)|''Blue Harvest'']]

Other topics involving the Antilles name include:

*'''[[Antilles BioGen]]''', a medical company that made [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[L-hand 980|replacement hand]] after his duel with [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]
*'''[[Wedge Antilles Boulevard]]''', a street on Corellia named after the famed pilot
*'''[[Antilles Four-Step Instant Speech]]''', created by Wedge Antilles
*'''[[Antilles Map]]''', a map that was discovered in the [[Great Duinarbulon Mausoleum]]
*'''[[Task Force Antilles|Task Force ''Antilles'']]''', a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic|Rebellion]] task force

==Real World==
===Television episodes===
*"[[The Antilles Extraction]]", the third episode of ''[[Star Wars Rebels]]'' [[Star Wars Rebels Season Three|Season Three]].

===Locations===
*[[Wikipedia:Antilles|The Antilles]] are a cluster of islands in the Atlantic Ocean, named after the mythical islands of Antillia featured in ancient maps.
